name: codex-obsidian-mcp
description: Expose an Obsidian vault to Codex and other MCP clients through a local, authenticated MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to your local Obsidian vault
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex MCP server entry for the local HTTP endpoint exposed by the Codex Obsidian MCP Obsidian plugin. Start Obsidian, enable the plugin, and set OBSIDIAN_MCP_API_KEY before use.
defaultPrompt: Draft edits for a vault note
